title: Colon and semicolon
description: Two punctuation marks for structure: colon (:) and semicolon (;)
text: note: this works; that does not. listen: be careful; the path is steep; we are close.
finger_focus: Right pinky to semicolon (; — home position) and colon (: Shift+;)

tips.text: Semicolon (;) is right on home row — right pinky, no Shift needed
Colon (:) is Shift + ; — right pinky for both

tips.target: note: this works; that does not. listen: be

tips.text: Use semicolon to link related thoughts: this; not that

tips.title: Подсказка
tips.text: Colon introduces lists or quotes: note: ...

tips.target: careful; the path is steep; we are close.

character_tips.anna: Semicolon links thoughts. Colon introduces. Both belong to the right pinky.
character_tips.maxim: Pros use semicolons sparingly but precisely. Colons set up the next idea.
character_tips.klavochka: Beautiful pauses — semicolons feel like a breath in writing 💖
